betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§2Enriched fertilizer§r allows you to advance to the next stage of crop technology! 

It is used in countless ways moving forward, but just to list a few it will be:

- Pumped into your crops for more efficient fertilization.
- Used to breed novel crops in the §dCrop Breeder§r.
- Used to synthesize new seeds in the §dSeed Generator§r.

§2Enriched Fertilizer§r is 10 times more potent than regular Fertilizer.

- When used in a §dCrop Manager§r, a single unit of fluid adds 10 fertilizer units to the machine's internal storage.
- When used in an §dIndustrial Farm§r, you only need to provide 1/10th of the amount indicated on the tooltips. (Except when using a Fertilization Unit.)

It will always be superior to the item based Fertilizers of the past, so moving forward you should be using it whenever possible.

When using the §dCrop Breeder§r or §dSeed Generator§r, the §2Enriched Fertilizer§r recipe costs scale with the stats of the resulting seeds. [warn]Keep this in mind as early tier machines all have a lower than usual fluid capacity.[/warn] You'll need at least §5HV§r machines in order to create maxed seeds. By default NEI shows you the costs for a maxed seed, so keep this in mind when looking up recipes.
